titleStmt.title: SII 29.82: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 82. (A.R. No. B. 796 of 1962-63.) JĪVAṆAGI, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar setup in the Hanumān temple.

It states that when Tribhuvanamalladēva was ruling the empire from the capital Jayantīpura, a grant was made for the worship, offerings, etc., to the god Nakharēśvara of Jīvanagi by the āchārya (of the temple), Śrī Lākuḷēśvara-paṇḍita along with the perggaḍes and the nakharas of the place. The details of grant are lost as the latter half of the record is heavily damaged.
It is dated in the Chālukya Vikrama year 50, Viśvā[vasu], Vaiśākha, śu, 13 Sunday. It corresponds to 1125 A.D., April 17, Friday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© © śrī śrī śrī śrī
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya
śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bha
ṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
tribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarā
jya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddha
māna mācaṁdrārkka tāraṁ sa
luttamire jayaṁntipurada nelevīḍi
noḷu sukhasaṁkhatā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyuttamire śrī maccāḷukya vi
krama variṣada 50 neya vi
śvāvasu saṁvatsarada vaiśākha suddha
13 Ādivāradaṁdu śrīma
tu jīvanigeya nakharēśvara dēvargge
Alliya Ācāryyaruṁ śrīlāku
ḷēśvara paṁḍitaruṁ Alliya
pergaḍegaḷuṁ Aśēṣa nakharaṁgaḷu
kya dēvara
pūje punaskāra nivēdya caitra pai
tra ga bhōga kkaṁ biṭṭa datti
maṁ biṭṭaru A
biṭṭaru Ā
very much damaged
Digital edition of SII 29.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
